description: Collections For War Victims to Be Held May 11 On Sunday May 11 the Bish ops Relief Campaign for Vic tims of War will be conducted in all Catholic churches in the Hartford Diocese The local drive will be part of a nationwide ap peal by the Catholic Bishops of America for funds to continue their relief programs for the destitute and suffering people of war ravaged lands regard less of race color or creed The campaign in the Hartford diocese will be restricted to cof lections at all Masses in all Cath olic churches The proceeds will not be restricted to Catholics for war sufferers will share in them irrespective of nationality or religion Although the col lections will be made only in churches contributions will be accepted from nonCatholics either through the parishes or directly to campaign headquar ters at 134 Farmington Avenue in Hartford TO MEET SUNDAY The Mayberry Athletic Club Inc will meet Sunday noon at the Great Hill clubhouse Patronize Gazette Advertisers VOCALISTS Mike Technique Styles Orchestra and Night Club Training Know the Do and Donts of Good Popular Singing Red Richman Hartfords Most Modern Popular Vocal Coach 926 Main St Suite 42 Brown Thomson
